content:
Morning! Today i wanna raise again topic about design in morimens. Consider this feedback on all the recently released characters

All the characters released after Doresain/Pickman look too normal. What do I mean? I mean, this could have been a character from any other game. Morimens it's a game with lovecraft wibes "Human vs Cosmic god"  

Compared to older characters, they don't have anything unusual. Yes, they have some injuries on their bodies, but it doesn't look unusual, more like, "Oh wow, so what?"

Gmurphy, Mouchite, Xu, New awakener "Vortice" have same problem. They are too average and/or too similar to ordinary people 

Looking at the old awakeners, they had their own "peculiarity." Corposant/Kathigu-Ra/Horla don't have a normal body; at first glance, you might mistake them for ordinary people, but upon closer inspection, you'll realize they're no longer human

Hamlet/Tawil/Gdoll/Doll/Clem/Nymphae/Murphy, and they're more like living constructs. Inside is emptiness, outside is a shell so as not to scare others

Lily/Ryker/Helot/Daffodil/Ogier/Lotan/Aigis work with dissolution. They turned their enemy into an ally and now use this power

Now let's look at the new awakenes again
Gmurphy love tentacle but if you forget that this is Morimens, i would call her a vampire xd 
Xu looks like normal human but have a "Secret". I don't like this concept but ok...
Mouchite human form another(death) world
Vortice "I love walking on beaches, leashes and being called a dog" (anime girl, nothing special :/)
不是很嚴重的bug就是有點克

I'm not sure if it would look (probably not if slapped onto current menu), but I feel like It would be much easier to spot the posse you want if you know it's slightly orange or something. At least when it comes to a selection of icons on that professionally edited image below.
Maybe I'm just mad that I'm blind. <:flop1:1356083604236800030>

用auto打列車的時候，我本來想說一直盯着它自己打研究一下這個auto到底是什麼運作原理……

~~啊啊啊別管這什麼雷霆配隊，我在刷同調率……~~

突然發現auto在進入超維回合的時候，它不會播放進超維回合的動畫，背景也不會變，這是「節省性能」之類的設計，還是純粹的bug？<:question2:1356053130336272414>
